description_long: This is a large, rectangular desk with a modern, minimalist design, featuring two symmetrical drawer pedestals on either side and an open space in the center for legroom. Each pedestal contains three drawers, all with small circular keyholes or pull points, suggesting secure storage. The desk has smooth, rounded edges and a uniform, light-colored finish, likely made from a solid material such as painted wood or laminate. The top surface is broad and flat, providing ample workspace for writing, computing, or organizing materials. The back of the desk is plain, with no additional features or openings, while the sides are solid and unadorned. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A large, modern desk with two sets of three drawers and a spacious central leg opening, finished in a smooth, light color. The design is minimalist and functional, with rounded edges and secure storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers (three per side) and a wide central opening for legroom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, rectangular profile of one pedestal and the desk's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the plain back of the desk and the closed backs of the drawer pedestals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the solid pedestal and desk depth.
attribute_orientation: The side with the six drawers and central opening is intended to face the user, providing access to storage and workspace, while the plain back faces away.
